diagnosis.signal: UoW uow_20260430_7c8d9e entered ready-for-steward on first execution; source is GitHub issue #1042 requesting addition of the --dry-run flag to the registry CLI.

prescription.summary: Add a --dry-run flag to the registry CLI (registry_cli.py) that prints planned mutations without writing to the database.
prescription.instructions:
Implement the --dry-run flag for the registry CLI as described in GitHub issue #1042.

1. Read the issue: gh issue view 1042 --repo SiderealPress/lobster
2. Create a worktree branch: git worktree add ~/lobster-workspace/projects/lobster-1042 feat/issue-1042-dry-run
3. Add --dry-run to the CLI argument parser in src/orchestration/registry_cli.py
4. When --dry-run is set, print each planned DB mutation as 'DRY-RUN: <mutation>' and return without executing
5. Add a test in tests/unit/test_orchestration/test_registry_cli.py covering the --dry-run path
6. Open a PR: gh pr create --repo SiderealPress/lobster --title 'feat: add --dry-run flag to registry CLI (#1042)'

Minimum viable output: PR opened against main with the --dry-run implementation and at least one passing test.
Boundary: do not modify registry.py, schema.sql, or any migration files.
